title: Quantifying the Necessity of Chain of Thought through Opaque Serial Depth
what_happened: arXiv:2603.09786v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) tend to externalize their reasoning in their chain of thought, making the chain of thought a good target for monitoring. title: How NVIDIA Builds Open Data for AI

title: Amazon gets court order blocking Perplexity's AI shopping agent
what_happened: Amazon stops Perplexity's shopping bot by court order: a ruling that could shape the future of AI agents in e-commerce. The article Amazon gets court order blocking Perplexity's AI shopping agent appeared first on The Decoder.
primary_risk: Debugging complexity and cascading failures in agentic systems.
primary_opportunity: End-to-end automation of complex cognitive workflows.
technical_angle: Agent orchestration is emerging as a new software abstraction layer.

title: ChatGPT now explains math and physics with interactive visualizations
what_happened: ChatGPT now displays interactive visualizations for math and physics topics where users can tweak variables and watch graphs update in real time. More than 70 concepts are available at launch. The article ChatGPT now explains math and physics with interactive visualizations appeared first on The Decoder.
primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
primary_opportunity: Selective adoption in niche use cases with clear ROI.
technical_angle: Adds empirical validation to approaches already used in production AI stacks.

title: How physical AI integration accelerates vehicle innovation
what_happened: The integration of physical AI into vehicles remains a primary objective for automakers looking to accelerate innovation.
